question: Q1: Monetization Models

sections.prompt: Raise your hand if you’ve tried subscriptions.
sections.hint: Recurring revenue like Netflix or Spotify
no_hands: What makes subscriptions feel like a poor fit for your apps?
What challenges do you imagine if you wanted to add them?
Which other model feels more natural for your users?
hands_up: Why do subscriptions fit your app category well?
How did you design your tiers or paywall?
What patterns did you notice in who subscribes and who doesn’t?
How do you handle cancellations or churn?
Looking back, what would you have done differently?
follow_ups: Did anyone expect subscriptions to perform better than they did?
Who has tested free trials or intro offers — how did that go?
What’s one trick about subscriptions that others here might not know?

sections.prompt: Raise your hand if you’ve used one-time purchases.
sections.hint: Pay once for lifetime access or to unlock a feature
no_hands: Why do you think one-time purchases aren’t common in your apps?
What kind of app do you think they work best for?
If you tried one, what feature would you sell?
hands_up: Why did you choose this model?
How did users respond to it?
follow_ups: Has anyone moved away from one-time purchases? Why?
Did anyone find them more effective than subscriptions?
Who has a creative way of packaging them that worked well?

sections.prompt: Raise your hand if you’ve integrated ads.
no_hands: Why do ads not feel like the right fit?
What would make you consider adding them?
Which categories do you think ads work best in?
hands_up: Did ads change your retention or engagement?
What’s one lesson you learned about balancing ads with UX?
follow_ups: Has anyone removed ads after trying them?
Did anyone see ads outperform other models?
Who has a tip for balancing ads with good UX?

sections.prompt: Raise your hand if you’ve tried hybrid models.
sections.hint: Free users see ads, premium users subscribe
no_hands: Why do you think hybrids aren’t common in your apps?
If you were to design one, which combination would you try?
Where do you think hybrids could add value?
hands_up: What mix did you use, and why?
How did mixing models affect UX and retention?
Did hybrids boost revenue or just add complexity?
What advice would you give for trying a hybrid?
follow_ups: Has anyone gone back to a single model?
Did hybrids work better or worse for retention?
Who has a unique combo others might not have considered?

wrap_up: If you had to pick one model for your next app, which would you choose and why?
Who has changed models after launch? Why?
What’s the biggest trade-off you’ve seen between monetization and UX?
What do you wish you’d known before trying your first monetization experiment?
